subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-10-12 in Oakland
subcodes.first_line: This morning we spoke in the Temple Emanu-El at the invitation of Dr. Meyer, who is a most broadminded man. In Persia there are a great many Jews who have become followers of Bahá’u’lláh.
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @oneness; unity of religion, @crucifixion; ascension of Christ, @rejection, opposition and persecution
